message:
feat(demo_showcase): Add inspector/debug panel (Ctrl+D)

Implement Pass 6 of the render pipeline - the inspector panel that shows:

**Performance Stats:**
- Real-time FPS with color coding (green ≥55, yellow otherwise)
- Frame time in milliseconds
- Cells updated per frame
- Total memory usage (buffers + hitgrid)

**Terminal Capabilities:**
- TrueColor, Sync output, Hyperlinks, Mouse, Focus, Bracketed paste
- Green = enabled, Red = disabled

**Demo Mode Flags:**
- Tour mode status (ON/off)
- Renderer mode (Threaded/Direct)
- FPS cap setting

The panel is positioned in the top-right corner with a semi-transparent
dark background and accent-colored border. Toggle with Ctrl+D.

Refs: bd-1t2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
